steps: Go to https://dashboard.fauna.com/ and sign up or log in
Create a new database or select an existing one from the dashboard
In the left sidebar, click on 'Keys' under your database
Choose a Role for the key (e.g., 'Admin' for full access, 'Server' for read/write, 'Client' for limited access)
Optionally give the key a name, then click 'Save'
Copy the Key Secret immediately — it is only shown once and cannot be recovered

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Database Secret Key
credential_fields.description: Your Fauna database secret key. Used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Scoped to a specific database and role.

notes: Free tier available: 100K read ops, 50K write ops, and 500K compute ops per day
Secret key is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately; it cannot be recovered
Keys are scoped to a specific database — create separate keys for different databases
Role options: Admin (full control), Server (read/write data), Server Read-Only, Client (limited)
Fauna's API base URL is https://db.fauna.com (not api.fauna.com)
All queries use POST /query/1 with FQL in the request body

test_endpoint.description: Execute a simple FQL query (e.g., Collection.all()) to verify credentials
